creator: asami@cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* 	During startup the following bogus message is printed:
 * 
 * 	netscape.bin: locale `de_DE.ISO_8859-1' not supported by Xlib;
 * 	trying `C'.

I don't think that is bogus.  It is not supported.

 * +unset LANG

Um, now *this* is most certainly bogus.  I'm sure Andrey has something 
to say about that. :)

Satoshi
